title: viola × iselensis
intro: Viola × iselensis, also known as the hybrid viola, is a rare and endangered plant species resulting from the cross between Viola iselensis and Viola selkirkii. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Viola × iselensis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant, protecting against cell damage and oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Viola × iselensis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential applications.
